subcodes.first_line: O beloved spiritual friend! Night and day I am ever mindful of thee, without a moment's respite; yet due to the multitude of occupations, correspondence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز روحانی شب و روز بیاد تو هستم آنی فراغت ندارم ولی از کثرت مشاغل مکاتبه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
